title: PvP Remaked
description: We deliver the best PvP experience in the most optimized and high-quality way.
body:
# About
With this modpack, we offer a well-optimized experience while taking your PvP experience to the highest level.

# Highlighted Features
- All resource packs that work in OptiFine work seamlessly in this modpack.
- You can see older messages written in the chat and also use a smoother chat.
- You can see how many totems you have left.
- Shield statuses are shown with colors.
- Your capes from OptiFine, LabyMod, and the MinecraftCapes Mod are visible.
- You can chat with your friends using the Essentials Mod.
- You can see ping values faster before connecting to servers.
- Your armor durability values are displayed on the left side of the inventory HUD.
- The remaining duration of the potions you take is shown at the top right.
- The remaining duration of the potions you drink is shown in the top right. You can also see which potions other players are using from the particles around them.
- You can see your saturation level and how much saturation foods will provide.
- Fullbright, low fire, low shield, no fog, and no pumpkin blur are available.
- You can view the contents of Shulker Boxes directly from your inventory.
- If you’re within hitting distance of a player, your crosshair changes. When you successfully land a hit, it is also indicated on the crosshair. Additionally, when your elytra is equipped, you’ll see a warning below the crosshair indicating that it is active.

and more!
